http.400: Bad request. Please check your input and try again.
http.401: You are not authorized. Please log in again.
http.403: You don't have permission to perform this action.
http.404: The requested resource was not found.
http.409: This operation conflicts with existing data.
http.429: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
http.500: An internal server error occurred. Please try again later.
http.502: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
http.503: Service is under maintenance. Please try again later.

auth.accountLocked: Your account has been locked. Please contact support.
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
auth.passwordResetRequired: You must reset your password before continuing.

member.alreadyExists: A member with this email or phone already exists.
member.invalidEmail: Please provide a valid email address.
member.invalidPhone: Please provide a valid phone number.
member.cardAlreadyLinked: This card is already linked to another account.
member.enrollmentFailed: Failed to enroll member. Please try again.

reward.notAvailable: This reward is not currently available.
reward.alreadyRedeemed: This reward has already been redeemed.
reward.limitReached: You have reached the redemption limit for this reward.
reward.tierRequired: This reward requires a higher membership tier.

merchant.subscriptionRequired: This feature requires an active subscription.
merchant.limitReached: You have reached your plan's limit.
merchant.integrationError: Failed to connect to the integration service.

transaction.alreadyProcessed: This transaction has already been processed.
transaction.refundNotAllowed: Refunds are not allowed for this transaction.

network.connectionFailed: Unable to connect. Please check your internet connection.
network.timeout: The request timed out. Please try again.
network.offline: You appear to be offline. Please check your connection.

generic.tryAgain: Something went wrong. Please try again.
generic.contactSupport: If this problem persists, please contact support.
